  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary difference between a Deterministic Finite Automaton (DFA) and a Nondeterministic Finite Automaton (NFA)?",
      "options": [
        "A) A DFA can have multiple states with no initial state, while an NFA has one state with no initial state.",
        "B) A DFA has a fixed transition function, while an NFA has multiple possible transitions.",
        "C) A DFA has no epsilon transitions, while an NFA has epsilon transitions.",
